title: Dev's Better Bubbles
body:
🌊 **Dev's Better Bubbles** – **Minecraft Resource Pack**

Dive deeper in style with Dev's Better Bubbles, a Minecraft resource pack that transforms the classic air meter into something fresher and cleaner! Whether you’re exploring ocean ruins or just splashing around in rivers, your underwater experience gets a visual upgrade with newly redesigned bubble icons.

This pack reimagines the air bar with a custom look—while preserving the intuitive vanilla design you rely on to avoid drowning.

💧 _New textures for full, partial, and empty air bubbles!_
🐟 _Pairs perfectly with the vanilla aesthetic!_

Try out my other packs!

[Dev's Heart Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-heart-pack)

[Dev's Better Wither Hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-better-wither-hearts)

[Dev's Battery Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-battery-pack)
